channel.title: n0brains
channel.description: Think Less, Trade More. Two hosts break down what's actually happening in agentic AI — every few days.
channel.itunes:summary: Think Less, Trade More. Two hosts break down what's actually happening in agentic AI — every few days.
channel.itunes:author: n0brains

item.title: Ep 2: From AI Demos to Hardened Systems
item.description: Demos are dead, prompt engineering is dead, governance is the new moat. Three signals on what real production AI looks like in 2026.
item.itunes:summary: Demos are dead, prompt engineering is dead, governance is the new moat. Three signals on what real production AI looks like in 2026.
item.itunes:author: n0brains

item.title: Ep 1: How AI swarms broke the coding bottleneck
item.description: Three stories on agentic coding: Blitzy's 10,000 parallel agents, why coding agents waste 81% of their time searching files, and OpenAI's Symphony for autonomous dispatch.
item.itunes:summary: Three stories on agentic coding: Blitzy's 10,000 parallel agents, why coding agents waste 81% of their time searching files, and OpenAI's Symphony for autonomous dispatch.
item.itunes:author: n0brains
